global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with food icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a sale announcement.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Two product icons
elements.description: Two simple, stylized icons representing food items are centered, with a minimalist design and soft edges.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is placed below the product icons, featuring a simple design that complements the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon is positioned similarly to the previous one, maintaining a cohesive look.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying a discount percentage, designed with a bold font and contrasting color for visibility.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag element that is simple and unobtrusive, positioned near the discount badge.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: A bold, white headline text that reads 'Hungry? We got you' is prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A bright yellow text at the top announces 'CraveLoop SALE' in a playful font, drawing attention immediately.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A clear and inviting 'Shop now' button in a contrasting color, designed to stand out and encourage interaction.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small, bold text displaying '30%' that indicates a discount, designed to catch the viewer's eye.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, food icons, sale announcement
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is also at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Hungry? We got you, Fresh favorites nearby, CraveLoop SALE, Shop now, 30%
